content:
Hello!

I am currently working on: https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/issues/1119

And as Daniel suggests on the mailing list [1], the idea for the "ToBytes" trait is to have our own version and I agree after reading it now.

So for its implementation, should I submit a new patch or can I submit with v4 of FromBytes?

Thanks for your patience and guidance.

[1] https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/C0A689E8-4192-4851-9650-5B76F5A30086@collabora.com/
If the changes you are planning to make are built on top of previous versions, then submit them as v4.

I'll create kernel::transmute::ToBytes which my v4 patch (FromBytes) will use as bound.

i.e

trait ToBytes {}

trait FromBytes {
   fn foo_mut(mut Foo: &[u8]) -> &Self
   where
        Self: ToBYtes {}
}
